description: Havanna Holding S.A., through its subsidiaries, engages in the operation and franchise of coffee shops in Brazil, Peru, Paraguay, Chile, Spain, and Bolivia. The company offers caramel cookies, havannets, cookies, mini line, chocolates, caramel sauce, haired, lattes, and frappes. It also operates bars and cafés. The company is involved in the distribution activities in the United States, Colombia, Costa Rica, El, Nicaragua, Europe, Israel, and Australia. Havanna Holding S.A. was founded in 1947 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
